effect_summary: P2-1 introduces a pure, fail-closed source adapter for Rust-owned scanner snapshot rows. It establishes row-level provenance and cursor semantics without reading a database, writing persistence, starting a service, contacting an exchange, or extending any authority.
verification: E2 source review against Rust scanner runner, V030, and trading writer
red-to-green lifecycle invariant test for added/removed/active symbols
two focused plus adjacent ALR pytest runs: 153 passed each
py_compile and owned-file git diff --check pass
direct IO/trading authority import and call scan has no matches
conditions: P2-2 must first obtain a fresh PM -> E3 -> BB -> PM gate.
P2-1 output is not a durable processed-key store; P2-2 must persist deduplication and recovery state in append-only ALR-owned tables.
No profitability, proof, serving, or promotion claim is supported by this slice.
